agreement.full_name: Preferential Trade Agreement between Türkiye and Pakistan

notes: CORRECTED from the earlier flag raised in Step 5: the full year-by-year phased schedule DOES exist directly on the visible sheets (confirmed by inspecting the full column width, A1:BD272 - the earlier inspection pass only looked at the first ~8 columns and wrongly concluded no raw schedule existed). Three duty components confirmed: CD (Customs Duty), a middle component labeled 'AFL' on the Türkiye-side sheet but 'RD' (Regulatory Duty) on the Pakistan-side sheet - same concept, different label between the two sides of the same workbook, mapped to component='rd' in both cases for consistency with the schema's cd/rd/acd enum. ACD (Additional Customs Duty) is the third component on both sides. 11 years confirmed (2023-2033), matching entry_into_force=2023-05-01 and staging_horizon_yrs=11 (corrected from an earlier assumed 10). Anniversary date 1 May confirmed directly from the sheet's own date-selector instructions. Columns AP-AS on both sheets ('base','show_afl','show_acd','cd_mod','acd_mod','extra','has_rd','has_acd') are Excel UI helper/toggle columns for the date-selector feature, not real trade data - correctly excluded from the column mapping, same treatment as other files' search-helper columns.
